programs.title: Border Security: Canada's Front Line
programs.desc: An American's trip to Alaska heads south  officers suspect a convicted drug dealer is taking his business north  a ship containing weapons is searched.

programs.title: Border Security: Canada's Front Line
programs.desc: A currency dog sniffs out thousands in undeclared cash  an aspiring actor can't keep track of the plot  officers arrest a wanted burglar.

programs.title: Border Security: Canada's Front Line
programs.desc: A traveler's belongings raise repeated alarms  a man's reasons for studying in Canada may not be academic  an American couple make the move to Alaska.

programs.title: Border Security: Canada's Front Line
programs.desc: An American traveler has trouble recalling his hazy past  bad decisions may keep a rugby player off the pitch  a bag is found in a restricted area.

programs.title: Coast Guard Alaska
programs.desc: The Coast Guard faces gale force winds and relentless waves to rescue the crew of a battered fishing vessel, an injured hiker, and a pair of ailing patients in Kodiak and Sitka.
